title: Integrated bioinformatics analysis and clinical validation identifies TNFSF14 and CD40 as novel biomarkers for chronic kidney disease progression and tubulointerstitial injury.
abstract:
Integrated bioinformatics analysis and clinical validation identifies TNFSF14 
and CD40 as novel biomarkers for chronic kidney disease progression and 
tubulointerstitial injury.
query: renal tubular injury transcriptomics biomarker prediction model

ml_recommendations.rationale: Multi-block integration: MOFA+ or SNF latent factors as features, then standard classifier. Late fusion (train per-modality, vote) is robust when sample sizes differ across modalities. Early concatenation + LASSO is a strong baseline.
